text: An event horizon isn't a wall; it's a boundary beyond which nothing escapes. Imagine a point in space where escape speed equals light speed. That's it. Once you cross this point, no signal can escape. Not even light. This boundary marks the limits of our observable universe around black holes. Understanding event horizons helps us grasp the mysteries of gravity and spacetime. Curious about black holes? Follow for more mind-bending science!
